title: Tragacantha brachytropis
taxonomy: Tragacantha brachytropis is classified as a species of plant in the genus Tragacantha, which is a group of plants within the family Fabaceae. The genus Tragacantha is further classified as a subgenus within the larger genus Astragalus. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes. These plants are characterized by their fruit, which is a pod that splits open to release its seeds. The classification of Tragacantha brachytropis reflects its evolutionary relationships to other plants within the Fabaceae family.
